title: Complete A/C Repair with Freon and Recharge Included at Merrick Tire Center (Up to 52% Off)

pricing_options.label: AC Service Freon/flush, vacuum & Recharge Freon R-134A (UP TO 1 LB)

structured_fields.label: WHAT'S INCLUDED
value: Recharge with R-134A Freon (up to 1 lb)
Nationwide Repair Warranty (1 year or up to 12,000 miles)

highlights_html: Boost your car's cooling performance with expert A/C repair including system and vacuum service
highlights_text: Boost your car's cooling performance with expert A/C repair including system and vacuum service
about_deal_html:
Ever felt the frustration of a weak car air conditioner on a sweltering day? Experience a cool drive again with professional A/C service that includes everything from system to recharges. Skilled technicians ensure every component is checked for optimal performance. Enjoy peace of mind knowing your vehicle's air conditioning will keep you comfortable.

What We Offer

AC Service with Freon, Vacuum & Recharge (R-134A Up to 1 LB)

Services Offered:

  • A/C System Inspection – Check for leaks, pressure test, and basic performance check
  • Vacuum Service – Evacuate air and contaminants to ensure optimal cooling performance
  • Recharge with R-134A Freon – Refill system with up to 1 lb. of refrigerant
  • Temperature Check – Verify that the A/C is cooling properly after service

Please Note:

  • Any additional Freon beyond the included 1 lb will be an extra cost
  • Service applies to most vehicles using R-134A only
  • Not valid for vehicles requiring R-1234yf or with hybrid/electric systems
  • Extra charges may apply for SUVs, vans, or vehicles with dual A/C systems

Why You Should Grab The Offer

This deal provides exceptional value by ensuring your car's air conditioning operates at its best without breaking the bank. With Merrick Tire Center’s expert diagnostic capabilities using cutting-edge equipment, accurate problem identification is guaranteed before any work begins. The exclusive use of OEM parts ensures compatibility and longevity in every repair performed. Added peace of mind comes from their Nationwide Repair Warranty that extends support beyond local borders for one year or up to 12,000 miles. Their no-charge multi-point inspection allows early detection of potential issues which contributes greatly to vehicle safety and reliability. Opting for this offer means benefiting from highly rated mechanics dedicated to customer satisfaction through their 'Happiness Guaranteed' policy.

review_quotes.text: The shop did an excellent job on the 4-wheel alignment. Steering is straight, no vibration, and overall ride quality is much better.
review_quotes.author: ji

review_quotes.text: Excellent experience with wheel alignment. Just provide VIN so they can pull up specifications for your vehicle. Then in and out!
